basic_info.headline: AI Automation Engineer | Agentic AI & GenAI Developer | n8n Workflow Architect | Strategic PR & Growth Leader | Scalable Smart Systems Builder | 2025 CS Graduate | YLF Finalist
basic_info.about:
AI should be agentic, adaptable, and aligned with people.

I’m Gohar Hany — a CS graduate (2025) focused on Agentic AI, automation, and GenAI-driven solutions. I design and deploy intelligent systems that automate decision-making, enhance user experience, and scale across workflows.

My toolkit includes Gemini API, LangChain, FAISS, Supabase, and n8n — tools I’ve used to build AI agents, learning assistants, inventory bots, and customer support solutions serving 500+ users.

My background in public relations and education allows me to bridge the gap between technical systems and human needs. I’ve led 80+ partnerships, delivered nationwide campaigns, and trained individuals in communication, tech, and leadership.

I’m particularly passionate about Agentic AI — creating modular agents that reason, remember, and act with autonomy. I’m excited about roles and collaborations where I can apply automation and GenAI to build systems that matter.

experience.title: Coach
experience.description:
As a dedicated Coach at Hawk Insight, I play a crucial role in guiding participants through every stage of developing their own projects. My responsibilities include:

Comprehensive Business Planning:

Collaborate with participants to create all-encompassing plans necessary for building a business from scratch, including:
Business Model Canvas (BMC): Designing a clear and strategic framework for the business model.
Operational Plan: Outlining the day-to-day operations and processes to ensure smooth functioning.
Financial Plan: Developing detailed financial projections and budgeting to manage resources effectively.
Marketing Plan: Crafting strategies to promote the business and reach the target audience.
Skills Training and Development:

Provide training on essential soft skills required for effective communication and project management.
Teach presentation skills to help participants deliver compelling and impactful pitches.
Workshop Preparation and Delivery:

Design and facilitate workshops tailored to the specific needs of participants, focusing on practical application and collaborative learning.
Conduct interactive sessions to enhance participants' understanding and application of key concepts.
Project Mentorship:

Offer continuous support and mentorship throughout the project development phase, providing valuable feedback and guidance to refine ideas and achieve success.
Through these efforts, I aim to empower participants with the necessary tools and knowledge to build successful businesses and make a significant impact in their respective fields.

experience.title: Internship Trainee
experience.description:
During my summer internship at the Information Technology Institute (ITI), I gained comprehensive experience in supervised machine learning. The training covered:

Feature Data Types: Exploring how to classify and analyze different types of data for effective use in models.
Data Quality: Understanding how to assess and improve data quality to ensure model accuracy and minimize errors.
Strategies for Handling Missing Values: Applying techniques to address missing values and maintain the integrity of analysis.
Transforming Categorical Data: Learning how to convert categorical data into formats suitable for model analysis.
Handling Outliers: Identifying and managing outliers to enhance model performance.
Scaling: Implementing data scaling techniques to improve model performance and accuracy.
I also worked with a variety of machine learning models, including:

Linear Regression
Logistic Regression
Support Vector Machines (SVM)
Polynomial SVM
K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)
Decision Trees
Additionally, I developed a solid understanding of key concepts such as:

Gradient Descent
Confusion Matrix
Accuracy, Recall, Precision, F-score
Data Pipeline
Correct Data Splitting Techniques to Avoid Data Leakage
This internship provided me with a robust foundation in supervised machine learning and practical skills that I am excited to apply to future projects.

experience.title: Public Relations Specialist
experience.description:
As a Public Relations member, I had the opportunity to develop and apply a range of skills through various activities and partnerships. My experience included:

Skills Acquired:

Communication: Enhanced my ability to communicate effectively with diverse audiences and stakeholders.
Networking: Developed strong networking skills through building and maintaining relationships with different chapters and organizations.
Event Management: Gained hands-on experience in planning and executing events, including coordination with partners and managing logistics.
Strategic Planning: Learned to create and implement strategic plans to foster partnerships and maximize the impact of our events.
Key Achievements:

Partnerships: Successfully established and nurtured partnerships with multiple chapters, leading to fruitful collaborations and shared goals.
Events: Played a significant role in organizing and executing events in collaboration with our partners, ensuring successful outcomes and positive feedback.
This role allowed me to gain valuable experience in public relations, project management, and strategic partnership development, all of which I am eager to apply in future endeavors.

experience.title: Internship Trainee
experience.description:
During my recent professional development training, I gained essential skills and knowledge crucial for career advancement and personal growth. The training covered:

Skills Acquired:

CV Writing: Learned how to create a comprehensive and professional CV that effectively showcases my qualifications and experiences.
Interview Preparation: Developed strategies for preparing for interviews, including techniques for presenting myself confidently and handling various interview scenarios.
Self-Awareness: Enhanced my self-awareness, helping me understand my strengths and areas for growth to align my career goals with my personal attributes.
Emotional Intelligence: Gained insights into emotional intelligence, learning how to manage and apply emotions to improve communication, relationships, and decision-making.
Industry Exposure:

International and Multinational Companies: Familiarized myself with the names and fields of numerous international and multinational companies, broadening my understanding of the global business landscape and potential career opportunities.
This training has equipped me with valuable tools and insights to navigate my career path more effectively and approach professional challenges with confidence.

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science - CS, علوم الحاسب الآلي
education.description:
Graduation Project: Agentic AI Learning Assistant – Rated High Excellence

Studied a comprehensive and advanced curriculum focused on building intelligent, automated, and user-centered systems.

✅ Key Technical Areas:

Artificial Intelligence & GenAI: AI fundamentals, smart systems, intelligent agents, and digital image processing.

Automation & Systems Design: Distributed and parallel systems, operating systems, system programming, and simulation.

Programming & Engineering: OOP (Java), advanced programming, software engineering, HCI, and software testing.

Data & Algorithms: Data structures, algorithms, discrete math, linear algebra, numerical methods, and statistics.

Databases & Information Retrieval: Relational DBs, storage & retrieval techniques, and information access systems.

✅ Practical Experience:
Applied theoretical concepts in capstone projects and labs. Built automation workflows, AI-powered bots, and agentic systems.
education.activities: I actively contribute to various organizations, focusing on leadership, communication, and project management. Roles include Organization member at Empower, OC and HR member at Circle for Training and Consultancy (British Council collaboration), PR & Media member at 3ommar Team and Space E, and PR at MA SUSA(in Suez). I've also served as President of ZeroOne Team, gaining experience in project management at i-Code, directorship at 3ommarX, and training at iCareer, Hawk Insight, and ITI.
